name: spec-layer
description: Local-first Figma-to-Markdown design system specification toolkit

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/format/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/extractor/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/plugin/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run build:plugin
